# BTC Bridge

> BTC Bridge tracks routes that move native Bitcoin to smart-contract networks and return tokenized Bitcoin to BTC, without custodying funds.

## Key facts
- Route: source chain  destination chain
- Deposit: typically minutes
- Withdraw: may need proving/finalization
- Gas: native asset on both chains
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Verify: Use the official contracts; beware fake bridge sites

## On this page
- [What is BTC Bridge?](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#what)
- [How bridging works](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#how)
- [Depositing to the destination](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#deposit)
- [Withdrawing back](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#withdraw)
- [Time and fees](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#fees)
- [Is BTC Bridge safe?](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://btc-bridge.github.io/#faq)

- [BTC Bridge dashboard](https://btc-bridge.github.io/)
